title: Module 7.3: Crowd Safety & Management
subtitle: Master Crowd Dynamics, Density Management, and Emergency Egress
description: Learn to recognize dangerous crowd conditions before they become critical. Master crowd density calculations, flow management, barrier design, and emergency evacuation procedures. Based on industry best practices and lessons learned from historical crowd incidents.
learning_objectives: Calculate and monitor crowd density in real-time
Recognize warning signs of dangerous crowd conditions
Design effective crowd flow patterns and barrier systems
Plan and execute emergency crowd evacuations
Apply appropriate staffing ratios for crowd management
Respond effectively to crowd surges and crush conditions

badge.name: Crowd Safety Expert
badge.description: Mastered crowd safety and emergency management

research_alignment.adult_learning: Scenario-based learning with real incident analysis
research_alignment.interactive_design: Visual density calculators and real-time monitoring tools
